title: Cube's PVP Essentials
description: essentials tweaks for minecraft pvp for example : low fire , low shield , small totem.
body:
InnateCube PvP Essentials is a clean, lightweight Minecraft resource pack designed to enhance PvP gameplay without clutter or distraction.

The pack focuses on improved item textures and models for combat, keeping visuals clear, consistent, and easy to read in fast-paced fights. It’s optimized for performance and built to work across multiple Minecraft versions.
